ordering_rules: Entries are sorted by path ascending.
This inventory records release/control surfaces without resolving final ownership.
Generated evidence surfaces remain visible but non-authoritative unless explicitly promoted.

entries.name: ci workflow
entries.notes: Runs repo-sanity, xstack FAST/STRICT/FULL lanes, docs sanity, projection sanity, and build-test jobs.

entries.name: archive support
entries.notes: Small live implementation root for archive-related behavior.

entries.name: architecture registries
entries.notes: Contains architecture_graph, module_registry, module_dependency_graph, and repository_structure_lock.

entries.name: pack data manifests
entries.notes: Contains pack.toml, pack.manifest, and pack_manifest.json alongside content data.

entries.name: registry layer
entries.notes: Large machine-readable control surface including compat, component, policy, and process registries.

entries.name: governance docs
entries.notes: Contains semantic escalation, audit promotion, mode governance, and related policy prose.

entries.name: release doctrine docs
entries.notes: Scoped doctrine source for release semantics; authority is conditional per P-0.

entries.name: governance runtime
entries.notes: Code-level governance surface distinct from docs/governance.

entries.name: pack runtime manifests
entries.notes: Contains pack.json, pack.compat.json, pack.capabilities.json, and pack.trust.json families.

entries.name: release implementation
entries.notes: Contains build-id, archive policy, component graph, release manifest, and update resolver code.

entries.name: repo policy
entries.notes: Contains release_policy.toml, canon_state.json, and repox rulesets.

entries.name: compatx tooling
entries.notes: Contains schema diff, semantic contract validation, pack compatibility, and save/replay validation tooling.

entries.name: controlx tooling
entries.notes: Contains execution router, prompt parser, queue runner, and workspace manager tooling.

entries.name: distribution tooling
entries.notes: Contains build manifest, package index, pack discover, verify, and smoke helpers.

entries.name: release tooling
entries.notes: Concrete tooling layer for archive, component graph, release identity, and update flows.

entries.name: securex tooling
entries.notes: Contains trust model, pack signature, and integrity manifest tooling.

entries.name: xstack umbrella
entries.notes: Contains auditx, ci, compatx, controlx, packagingx, repox, securex, sessionx, and testx surfaces plus out/** results.

entries.name: channel manifests
entries.notes: Contains stable, beta, nightly, pinned, and changelog manifests.

derived_or_non_authoritative_echoes.note: Contains emitted reports and toolchain runs.
Contains generated release, validation, and schema echo trees.
